title: Clean Keystrokes
description: A clean and customizable keystroke display HUD for Minecraft. Displays WASD, spacebar, sneak, sprint, and mouse buttons with a mouse movement tracker.
body:
Clean Keystrokes

A clean and customizable keystroke display HUD for Minecraft. Shows your WASD keys, spacebar, sneak, sprint, and mouse buttons with a live mouse movement tracker.

Features

- Displays W, A, S, D, Space, Sneak, Sprint, LMB and RMB - Ability to disable Sneak/Sprint row - Toggleable animation - Option to enable tick synced key presses - Mouse movement tracker - Rainbow text mode - Fully customizable colors, including presets - Configurable via Mod Menu

Preview
